content: Confirmed: one file per conversation/session (not per message) because the conversation is the atomic unit of truth. Raw capture must be lossless and immutable — done/ files are never modified. The done/ move is a handoff signal to triage, not a 'finished' marker.

provenance.raw_agent: One file per conversation/session (not per message) — because the conversation is the atomic unit of truth. Raw capture must be lossless and immutable — done/ files should never be modified, only the derived artifacts change.
provenance.raw_user: Conversations are the source of truth for intent. Everything else is derived.
provenance.what_was_ratified: One file per session, immutable archive in done/, conversation as the atomic unit of truth
